ogTitle: Ninnes vs Noarlunga Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ninnes and Noarlunga Downs.
heading: Ninnes vs Noarlunga Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ninnes, South Australia and Noarlunga Downs, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Noarlunga Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Ninnes (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ninnes or Noarlunga Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ninnes has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Noarlunga Downs scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ninnes scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Noarlunga Downs scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ninnes or Noarlunga Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Noarlunga Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
